title: Jira issue field no longer an option when setting up recipe

posts.author: jennbaum (jennifer baum)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the Jira app installed and I am using the sync between jira issues template.
It will not allow me or provide a field to capture the Jira ID/link.
I’ve watched a few videos and it looks like it automatically makes that connection but for some reason, I’m not able to have this field pulled in.
